violations.text: The floors behind the oven and stove area have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Per owner, GM is signed up for class and then will register with RIDOH. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Behind the oven towards the back wall has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

The floors in the front service area is constructed of wood which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
Prepped veggie cream cheese was observed held past a day or date that exceeds 7 days. PIC disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. The non food contact surfaces of the metal bins storing dry ingredients were observed with a small accumulation of droppings. Bin was cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The floors in the front prep area is constructed of wood which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

The floors behind equipment has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The ceiling in the prep/ ware washing area has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by new droppings behind the grill unit. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
A dead rodent was observed in a trap behind the grill. Dead rodents shall be removed from the premises. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
Lowboy refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Per PIC, new unit was ordered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
An allergy statement is lacking on the menu. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine was turned off. Ice machine must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized prior to using. Establishment to increase cleaning frequency of ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Various foods were observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Establishment must store milk/dairy products completely submerged in ice. Milk was recently placed in bucket with ice. More ice was added to completely submerge milk. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Eggs are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in various locations in the facility. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
A cup was being used as a scoop in containers of ice. Scoop with a handle must be used to dispense ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
The hand sink was observed with a leaky faucet. The 3-bay sink was observed leaking into a bucket. A system must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
